The living and dining areas are separate, allowing better space utilisation and privacy within the home. The flat overlooks the main road, providing good visibility, natural light, and ventilation throughout the day. The property is east-facing and vastu compliant, making it suitable for buyers seeking a harmonious living space.::::The flat is semi-furnished and includes a modular kitchen without a chimney, vitrified tile flooring, and a piped gas connection. The building is equipped with essential amenities such as 24-hour water supply, security guard services, CCTV surveillance, and a lift for easy vertical access.::::The locality is well developed, with hospitals, malls, supermarkets, banks, public transport facilities, and the railway station all available within approximately 100 metres, making daily commuting and routine needs extremely convenient. The society also offers a gymnasium, supporting an active and healthy lifestyle.::::This property is an ideal option for families looking to purchase a spacious, ready-to-move apartment in a well-connected part of Navi Mumbai with essential amenities, good construction quality, and strong residential appeal.
